name: CANDAKA77 Airdrop is LIVE вАФ Complete Tasks, Level Up & Earn CDK77!
description:
CANDAKA77 (CDK77) is a deflationary ERC-20 utility token built on Ethereum with a fixed supply of **77,000,000** tokens. No new tokens can ever be minted вАФ supply only decreases over time through a **95% burn mechanism** on every exchange.

25% of the total supply (19,250,000 CDK77) is allocated to the community airdrop pool and distributed through a task-based leveling system.

## How It Works

Complete tasks to earn Experience Points (EXP). Accumulate 1,000 EXP to level up and claim CDK77 tokens for every level reached. Normal levels reward **100 CDK77**, while bonus levels (every 20th) reward **200 CDK77**. Reach max level 500 and earn up to **52,500 CDK77** per user.

## What Can You Do with CDK77?

- Trade freely on **Uniswap V2** (CDK77/WETH pair) вАФ 24/7, no intermediary
- Exchange for platform credits at a fixed rate of **30 CDK77 = 1 Credit**
- Hold and benefit from increasing scarcity as supply decreases
- Transfer peer-to-peer to any Ethereum wallet

## Why CDK77 Has Value

Every platform credit exchange permanently burns **95%** of the tokens used. More users = more burns = less supply = more scarcity. CDK77 is not a speculative token вАФ it is backed by real platform utility with a mathematically deflationary trajectory.

## Token Details

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| **Name** | CANDAKA77 (CDK77) |
| **Network** | Ethereum (ERC-20) |
| **Total Supply** | 77,000,000 (fixed, non-mintable) |
| **Airdrop Pool** | 19,250,000 CDK77 (25%) |
| **Contracts** | Open-source & verified |

## Rules

- One wallet per user (permanent binding)
- Bot accounts and duplicate entries will be disqualified
- All tasks are verified via API, server-side checks, or manual review
- Rewards are distributed through smart contract with signature verification

## Links

- **Website:** [premium.candaka77.com](https://premium.candaka77.com/)
- **Airdrop:** [premium.candaka77.com/page/airdrop](https://premium.candaka77.com/page/airdrop)
- **Whitepaper & Roadmap:** [premium.candaka77.com/page/whitepaper](https://premium.candaka77.com/page/whitepaper)

---

*Join the CANDAKA77 ecosystem early. Complete tasks, climb the leaderboard, and earn CDK77 before the airdrop pool runs out!*
 the airdrop pool runs out!

name: рЯУЦ ReadAide Explorer: Create Your Account & Start Your Reading Journey
description:
рЯЪА Welcome to the ReadAide Onboarding Quest!

![ReadAAde_CreateAccount.png](https://appeco.galxe.com/galxe/space/mdresource/85776/974e13d2-c3a7-4a8f-b593-5dc4673f9063.png)

ReadAide is a phonics-powered platform designed to help users learn, improve, and master reading skills through interactive tools and guided lessons.

рЯОѓ Your Mission: Create your free account on ReadAide and take the first step toward unlocking a smarter, more effective way to read.

рЯУЭ How to Complete This Quest:

1пЄПвГ£ Visit the official ReadAide platform рЯСЙ https://readaide.com
2пЄПвГ£ Click on "Log " or "Get Started"
3пЄПвГ£ Enter your details (email, username, password) or login via gmail and complete the registration process
4пЄПвГ£ Log into your new ReadAide account and explore the dashboard
6пЄПвГ£ Return here and claim your reward! рЯОБ

рЯМЯ Why ReadAide?

рЯУЪ Phonics-based learning tools to build strong reading foundations
рЯІ† AI-assisted features for personalized reading improvement
рЯМН Accessible from anywhere вАФ learn at your own pace
вЪ° Clean, intuitive interface built for learners of all levels

вЪ†пЄП Quest Rules:

1. You must create a new, genuine account on ReadAide.com
2. Each wallet/user may only complete this quest once
3. Duplicate or bot accounts will be disqualified вЭМ


рЯФЧ Useful Links:

рЯМР Platform: https://readaide.com


рЯТ° ReadAide is on a mission to make reading accessible, effective, and enjoyable for everyone. Join the community today and earn rewards while you learn!
